---
title: "Tidewater Barge, Vancouver, Washington"
year: 1
image: /images/vancouver_WA.jpg
image-alt: "Image of Vancouver, Washington"
categories: ["MRF"]
---
{{< include _return-to-pf.qmd >}}

::: {.article}
Mr. Bell was a subcontractor to URS Corporation to model the various financial
scenarios of transporting waste from Portland, Oregon via barge and long-haul
trucking to a distant landfill in the Columbia River Gorge. The financial
models developed for this project covered the ten-year contract life and
projected costs and rates for both barge and truck transport.

[Thumbnail Image by Spicypepper999 - Own work, CC0](https://commons.wikimedia.org/w/index.php?curid=149330291)
:::
